processes.name: completeCostAdjustment
preconditions: Cost adjustment must have at least one line
All lines must have a product assigned
All lines must have a non-zero adjustment amount
All products must be stocked items (productType = I)

steps.name: validatePreconditions
steps.description: Check that the cost adjustment meets all preconditions before completing

operation.assertion: adjustment.lines.length > 0 && adjustment.docStatus === 'DR' && adjustment.lines.every(l => l.product != null && l.adjustmentAmount !== 0)
operation.errorMessage: Cost adjustment does not meet completion preconditions

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject adjustments missing lines, wrong status, lines without product, or zero amount

steps.name: applyAdjustments
steps.description: Apply each line's adjustment amount to the product costing record

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Product costing records are updated with the adjustment amounts

steps.name: postAccounting
steps.description: Create accounting entries for the cost variance

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Accounting entries are created for the cost variance

steps.name: updateStatusComplete
steps.description: Set cost adjustment status to CO, mark as processed

edgeCases.description: Cost adjustment has no lines - must reject
A line has zero adjustment amount
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating zero adjustment amount not allowed

edgeCases.description: A line references a non-stocked product (service item)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating only stocked items can be cost-adjusted
Entire transaction rolls back - status remains unchanged, product costs not modified

steps.name: validateStatusCompleted
steps.description: Verify the cost adjustment is in Completed status before allowing void

operation.errorMessage: Only completed cost adjustments can be voided

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject void action if document is not in CO status

steps.name: reverseAdjustments
steps.description: Reverse all cost adjustments applied to product costing records

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Product costing records are restored to pre-adjustment values

steps.name: reverseAccounting
steps.description: Reverse accounting entries created during completion

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Accounting entries from completion are reversed

steps.name: updateStatusVoid
steps.description: Set cost adjustment status to VO

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a draft cost adjustment (status DR)
Attempt to void an already voided cost adjustment (status VO)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - cannot void an already voided document
Entire transaction rolls back - status remains CO
